task_completion.description: Configure Pacifico as a Downloadable Font using Google Play Services
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file named 'pacifico.xml' in the 'res/font' directory open in the editor. It should contain XML attributes for a downloadable font, specifically 'app:fontProviderAuthority="com.google.android.gms.fonts"' and 'app:fontProviderQuery="Pacifico"'.
Look for a resource file like 'styles.xml' or 'themes.xml' open in the editor, showing a style declaration exactly matching '<style name="QuoteTextStyle">'.

task_completion.description: Set the font family of QuoteTextStyle to @font/pacifico
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'QuoteTextStyle' definition, look for an item setting the font family, such as '<item name="android:fontFamily">@font/pacifico</item>'.

task_completion.description: Set the text size of QuoteTextStyle to 24sp
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'QuoteTextStyle' definition, look for an item setting the text size, such as '<item name="android:textSize">24sp</item>'.

task_completion.description: Set the text color of QuoteTextStyle to #FF000000
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'QuoteTextStyle' definition, look for an item setting the text color, such as '<item name="android:textColor">#FF000000</item>'.

task_completion.description: Apply QuoteTextStyle to the quote_text TextView
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'activity_main.xml' open in the editor. Find the TextView with 'android:id="@+id/quote_text"' and verify it has the attribute 'style="@style/QuoteTextStyle"' applied to it.

integrity.description: The agent used the Android Studio GUI to make modifications
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the XML files are open and being edited within the Android Studio IDE editor tabs, rather than being manipulated solely via terminal commands like 'echo' or 'sed'.

integrity.description: The font file was not bundled directly into the app
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the Project tool window under 'res/font/'. There should be a 'pacifico.xml' file but NO 'pacifico.ttf' or 'pacifico.otf' files, as the task explicitly forbids bundling the font file.

integrity.description: The agent modified the correct QuoteApp project
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the Android Studio project tree or file paths visible in the editor tabs indicate the agent is working within the 'QuoteApp' project directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project directory is /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/QuoteApp. The font name is 'pacifico' and must be configured as a downloadable font using the provider authority 'com.google.android.gms.fonts' (no .ttf/.otf files should be bundled). The style name must be exactly 'QuoteTextStyle' with a text size of '24sp'. The style must be applied to the TextView with ID 'quote_text' in activity_main.xml.
